title: Villager Follow You
description: The villager will follow you anywhere you go after you give him 5 emeralds.
body:
Ever wished villagers could actually follow you like pets?
With Villager Follow You, now they can!

![Owned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cac6286b12ba61473bcc23bb24980c7e26cf0898_0.webp)

This mod lets you buy the loyalty of any villager using 5 emeralds.
Once tamed, the villager becomes yours and will follow you wherever you go!

**What the mod adds**

Sneak + Right-click a villager with 5 emeralds to make them yours.

Your villager will get a green name tag showing that you own them.

Sneak + Right-click again to tell them to follow you or stay where they are.

Cool particle effects appear when you tame a villager.

**Perfect for:**

Bringing villagers safely to new bases

Making trading halls easier

Keeping villagers from wandering away

Simple, clean, and fun bring your villagers with you anywhere!
